title: Hornet Removal in Stapleton, Staten Island | $350 – $550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Stapleton, Staten Island. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination for homes and businesses. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets in Stapleton? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout this historic Staten Island neighborhood. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from residential properties, commercial buildings, and outdoor spaces, protecting your family and customers from painful stings.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Stapleton homeowners and businesses for years with proven hornet removal expertise. Our licensed technicians use safe, effective methods to eliminate nests completely while preventing future infestations, all at competitive prices of $350 – $550.
localContext: Stapleton's mix of Victorian homes, waterfront properties near Tappen Park, and tree-lined streets create ideal nesting spots for hornets in eaves, attics, and mature trees. From historic residences near the Staten Island Ferry to modern apartments and local businesses along Bay Street, we protect all of Stapleton's diverse properties from dangerous hornet activity.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Stapleton?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout Stapleton. Once you call, we'll schedule an appointment within 24 hours in most cases. Our technicians arrive fully equipped to safely remove the nest and treat the area to prevent hornets from returning.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350 – $550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area, and preventative measures to discourage future nesting. The final cost depends on nest size, location accessibility, and the severity of the infestation. We provide upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Stapleton during certain seasons?
faqs.answer: Hornet activity peaks in Stapleton from late spring through early fall, with nests growing largest in August and September. Staten Island's coastal climate and abundant vegetation make it attractive to hornets. We recommend scheduling removal as soon as you notice a nest, as colonies grow rapidly during warmer months.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our certified technicians use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols during hornet removal. We'll advise you to keep family and pets indoors during treatment, and the area is typically safe within a few hours. Professional removal is much safer than attempting DIY methods, which often provoke aggressive hornet attacks.
